mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.rule_code, i.check_table_name, i.check_column_name, i.notice_message, i.enable_flag, i.sort, i.create_time, i.create_by, i.update_time, i.update_by, i.remark, i.version, t.table_comment check_table_comment, c.column_comment check_column_comment FROM rm_check_rule_item i LEFT JOIN information_schema.`TABLES` t ON t.table_schema = #{tableSchema} AND t.table_name = i.check_table_name LEFT JOIN information_schema.`COLUMNS` c ON c.table_schema = #{tableSchema} AND c.table_name = i.check_table_name AND c.column_name = i.check_column_name WHERE i.`status` = 1 AND i.rule_code = #{ruleCode} AND i.enable_flag = #{enableFlag} ORDER BY c.ordinal_position ASC
SELECT rule_code, check_table_name, check_column_name, notice_message FROM rm_check_rule_item WHERE `status` = 1 AND enable_flag = 1 AND rule_code = #{ruleCode}
